name: Brene Brown
theme: warm sunlight cozy morning golden hour

quotes.text: Vulnerability is not winning or losing; it's having the courage to show up and be seen when we have no control over the outcome.
quotes.author: Brene Brown

quotes.text: Courage starts with showing up and letting ourselves be seen.
quotes.author: Brene Brown

quotes.text: You are imperfect, you are wired for struggle, but you are worthy of love and belonging.
quotes.author: Brene Brown

quotes.text: Owning our story and loving ourselves through that process is the bravest thing that we'll ever do.
quotes.author: Brene Brown

quotes.text: What we know matters, but who we are matters more.
quotes.author: Brene Brown

quotes.text: Authenticity is the daily practice of letting go of who we think we're supposed to be and embracing who we are.
quotes.author: Brene Brown

quotes.text: Vulnerability sounds like truth and feels like courage. Truth and courage aren't always comfortable, but they're never weakness.
quotes.author: Brene Brown

quotes.text: Stay in your own lane. Comparison kills creativity and joy.
quotes.author: Brene Brown

quotes.text: Daring greatly means the courage to be vulnerable. It means to show up and be seen. To ask for what you need. To talk about how you're feeling.
quotes.author: Brene Brown

quotes.text: We don't have to do all of it alone. We were never meant to.
quotes.author: Brene Brown

quotes.text: Imperfections are not inadequacies; they are reminders that we're all in this together.
quotes.author: Brene Brown

quotes.text: Connection is why we're here. It's what gives purpose and meaning to our lives.
quotes.author: Brene Brown

quotes.text: Talk to yourself like you would to someone you love.
quotes.author: Brene Brown

quotes.text: I don't have to chase extraordinary moments to find happiness — it's right in front of me if I'm paying attention and practicing gratitude.
quotes.author: Brene Brown

quotes.text: Faith is a place of mystery, where we find the courage to believe in what we cannot see and the strength to let go of our fear of uncertainty.
quotes.author: Brene Brown

quotes.text: You can choose courage or you can choose comfort, but you cannot choose both.
quotes.author: Brene Brown

quotes.text: Only when we are brave enough to explore the darkness will we discover the infinite power of our light.
quotes.author: Brene Brown

quotes.text: Vulnerability is the birthplace of innovation, creativity and change.
quotes.author: Brene Brown

quotes.text: The willingness to show up changes us. It makes us a little braver each time.
quotes.author: Brene Brown

quotes.text: True belonging doesn't require you to change who you are; it requires you to be who you are.
quotes.author: Brene Brown

quotes.text: When we deny our stories, they define us. When we own our stories, we get to write the ending.
quotes.author: Brene Brown

quotes.text: Shame cannot survive being spoken. It cannot survive empathy.
quotes.author: Brene Brown

quotes.text: Perfectionism is not the same thing as striving to be your best. Perfectionism is the belief that if we live perfect and look perfect, we can minimize the pain of blame, judgment, and shame.
quotes.author: Brene Brown

quotes.text: Belonging is the innate human desire to be part of something larger than us. Because this yearning is so primal, we often try to acquire it by fitting in and by seeking approval.
quotes.author: Brene Brown

quotes.text: There is no innovation and creativity without failure. Period.
quotes.author: Brene Brown

quotes.text: Unused creativity is not benign. It metastasizes. It turns into grief, rage, judgment, sorrow, shame.
quotes.author: Brene Brown

quotes.text: I've learned that trust is built one marble at a time.
quotes.author: Brene Brown

quotes.text: People who wade into discomfort and vulnerability and tell the truth about their stories are the real badasses.
quotes.author: Brene Brown

quotes.text: Until we can receive with an open heart, we are never really giving with an open heart.
quotes.author: Brene Brown

quotes.text: If we can share our story with someone who responds with empathy and understanding, shame can't survive.
quotes.author: Brene Brown
